calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Discharged
MINI MINUTES: Order of Examination Jan. 16, 2019
Appearances: Jan Kopczynski, Esq. for Judgment Creditor Candlestick Point.
Randal Blair, Esq. for and with Judgment Debtor, Adam Cousiakis, was sworn in and examined.
Examination concludes, matter is discharged.
Dept. 514; Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jan A. Kopczynski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Candlestick Point - The Cove Homeowner's Association, a California Corporation.
Witness: Teri Atkins Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Adam Bousiakis,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations and Exhibits admitted into evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Candlestick Point - The Cove Homeowners Association and against Defendant Adam Bousiakis.

It is hereby ordered, adjudged, and decreed that Judgment be, and hereby is entered against defendant Adam Bousiakis in the amount of $17,404.59.

Judgment signed in open court.
